# Footnotes Test

This is a paragraph with a standard footnote[^1].
Here is another footnote with a named label[^named-label].

You can reference the same footnote again[^1].

And here is an inline footnote^[This is an inline footnote without a separate definition block.].

[^1]: This is the first footnote definition. It can contain multiple lines.
[^named-label]: This is a named footnote definition.
